name: Individual Beef Wellington
recipeIngredient: 1/2 of a 17 oz pkg. (1 sheet) frozen puff pastry
1 tablespoon deli or canned mushroom pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the puff pastry according to package directions; set aside.
2. In a small bowl, stir together salt, pepper, and crushed marjoram.
3. Rub the seasoning mixture over the steaks, coating all sides.
4. Cut the thawed pastry into two portions.
5. Spread 1 tablespoon of pate on one side of each steak.
6. Place a steak with the pate side down onto the center of each portion of pastry.
7. Wrap the pastry around the meat, trimming excess pastry from the ends.
8. Seal the ends securely.
9. Place seam-side down in a greased, shallow baking pan.
10. Brush the pastries with beaten egg white. If desired, reroll any trimmings to make cutouts.
11. Bake uncovered at 425°F for about 15 minutes or until the pastry is golden and the meat reaches medium-rare doneness (140°F).
12. Serve with Bordelaise Sauce if desired.
